{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Raithe family
| introduced = The Pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Visirian government did not officially endorse actions against the [[Raithe family]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c34">''The Pilot'', chapter 34</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
